name: Super Cache
description: WordPress WP Super Cache equivalent — browser cache headers for public pages.
author: NodePress

settings.label: Enable caching headers
settings.description: Send Cache-Control headers on public GET requests.

settings.label: Browser cache max-age (seconds)
settings.description: How long browsers should cache public pages.

settings.label: Cache static assets path
settings.description: Apply long cache headers on /uploads/* files.

settings.label: Excluded paths
settings.description: Comma-separated paths that should never be cached.
